meaning: 普罗夫迪夫[保加利亚南部城市](旧称菲利波波利
examples: The Novotel Plovdiv is the hotel of choice for visitors to Plovdiv.
Today, at Plovdiv, Carlo Ancelotti received his "honoris causa" degree in Communications and Sport.
The ministry would not name the new owners of the Plovdiv mill, saying they would be announced in a few days.
Plovdiv has all the services and attractions of a major population centre, but it especially takes pride in its old town.
In 1943, German forces took 8, 500 Jews to a square in the Bulgarian city of Plovdiv in preparation for deportation to death camps in Poland.
